release.notes: D1 Max MC version is 26.1.2, will try to load on unsupported versions instead of disabling. D2 Min MC version is 1.20. New config option auto_apply_resource_pack. Wrench Texture packs for 1.20-26.1.2. Texture command provides link for texture pack. D3 Refactored commands into separate handlers and moved events to dedicated classes. General code cleanup. D4 Max version now 26.2

developer.notes: D1 Max MC version is 26.1.2, will try to load on unsupported versions instead of disabling. D2 Min MC version is 1.20. New config option auto_apply_resource_pack. Wrench Texture packs for 1.20-26.1.2. Texture command provides link for texture pack. D3 Refactored commands into separate handlers and moved events to dedicated classes. General code cleanup.
